rationale: Top-of-form LLC name (current legal name being amended). Domestic Maine filing — uses entity.name (not entity.home_jurisdiction_name).

label_verbatim: FIRST: The name of the limited liability company has been changed to (if no change, so indicate)
rationale: New LLC name when changing; form footnote permits 'no change' as the value if no rename. Same key family as MBCA-9 / MLLC-9-style amendments.

label_verbatim: SECOND: The date of filing of the initial certificate of formation:
rationale: Date the original certificate of formation was filed with SOS. Anchor for the amendment-validity check (initial filing must precede this amendment).

label_verbatim: THIRD: Designation as a low profit LLC — This is a low-profit limited liability company pursuant to 31 MRSA §1611
rationale: Boolean elect-in for low-profit LLC status under 31 MRSA §1611 (the form lists the four §1611 qualification statements A–D inline).

label_verbatim: FOURTH: Designation as a professional limited liability company — This is a professional limited liability company* formed pursuant to 13 MRSA Chapter 22-A
rationale: Boolean elect-in for professional LLC status under 13 MRSA Chapter 22-A. When true, entity.professional_services_description.line{1,2} must be populated.

First line of the professional-services description (PLLC only). Multi-line shape primitive — same as LP_MLPA-12-1 entity.professional_services_description.lineN, MLPA-13A amendment.changes_description.lineN.
Second line of the professional-services description.
Independent checkbox (on-state Yes) verified by geometry+text on page 1; enum_select value 'commercial'.

label_verbatim: FIFTH: CRA Public Number (alongside Commercial Registered Agent radio)
rationale: CRA Public Number, required when registered_agent.type = 'commercial'. Positioned at y≈458 alongside Check Box8 (commercial radio) — distinct from any noncommercial-side widget.
Name of the commercial registered agent. Synth fills exactly one of Text10 / Text11 based on registered_agent.type.
Independent checkbox (on-state Yes) verified by geometry+text on page 1; enum_select value 'noncommercial'.
Name of the noncommercial registered agent (alternative slot to Text10). Same canonical key — exactly one is filled per registered_agent.type.

label_verbatim: FIFTH: (physical location, not P.O. Box – street, city, state and zip code)
rationale: Physical address of the registered agent in Maine (single-line: street, city, state, zip; not P.O. Box).

label_verbatim: FIFTH: (mailing address if different from above)
rationale: Mailing address of the registered agent (when different from physical).

label_verbatim: SEVENTH: Other changes …are set forth in Exhibit ____ attached and made a part hereof.
rationale: Exhibit letter for other amendments not covered by FIRST–FIFTH (catch-all). Same shape as LP_MLPA-12A filing.other_amendments_exhibit_letter.
Date the amendment was signed.

label_verbatim: **Authorized person(s) — (Type or print name and capacity) [signer slot 1]
rationale: Combined name + capacity of the first authorized-person signer (Shape D primitive applied to the authorized_person_N pattern). Same key family as LLC_MLLC-6A authorized_person_N.printed_name_and_capacity.

label_verbatim: **Authorized person(s) — (Type or print name and capacity) [signer slot 2]
rationale: Combined name + capacity of the second authorized-person signer (optional). The (s) in 'person(s)' indicates one or more — slot 1 is required, slot 2 is optional.

label_verbatim: Name of entity(s) on the submitted filings [1]
rationale: Cover-letter row 1 (cover-letter primitive).

widget_id: Name of entitys on the submitted filings 2
rationale: Cover-letter row 2. Field-id has typo 'entitys' (no apostrophe) preserved upstream.

label_verbatim: Hold attested copy for pick up
rationale: Expedite enum value 'hold_for_pickup'.
Expedite enum value '24h_next_business_day'.
Expedite enum value 'immediate_same_day'.
Total fees ($50 base plus expedite premium).
Contact name.
Contact phone.

widget_id: Contact email address for this filing
rationale: Filing-specific contact email.

widget_id: Email address to use for annual report reminders
label_verbatim: (Email address to use for annual report reminders)
rationale: Annual-report reminder email.
Recipient name.
Recipient firm.
Recipient street.
Recipient city/state/zip combined. Field-id has double-space ('City State  Zip') preserved upstream.
